name: wxcode-admin-meadow-agri
title: Meadow Admin
description: Light-mode natural admin aesthetic: white and #f7faf5 surfaces, #e6ece1 borders, accent green (#16a34a) and earth-amber (#a16207) on a slate neutral ramp, Inter type with tabular figures, 12px soft card radii, and generous whitespace. Archetype = 240px left sidebar (entity switcher + grouped nav sections) + full-width topbar with search + context badge + avatar + 4 KPI cards + status board with inline SVG trend chart + telemetry readings table + right context panel + task side card. Built for calm operational oversight interfaces.

query.en: Apply this light natural admin aesthetic to my domain — white and green-accent surfaces, left sidebar with entity switcher and grouped nav, 4 KPI cards, a status board with an inline trend chart, a telemetry readings table, and a right context + task panel, plus list / form / detail screens.
query.zh-CN: 将这种自然浅色风格应用到我的领域：白色与绿色强调色、左侧边栏含实体切换器和分组导航、4 张 KPI 卡片、带折线图的状态看板、遥测数据表格，以及右侧上下文和任务面板，并配套列表 / 表单 / 详情页面。

provenance.note: original archetype; no third-party template reproduced
